variant: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

request.message: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

response_body.response: sleep is the master variable for muscle growth. here are the key numbers:  the bottom line: you're losing 10–15% of your testosterone and most of your growth hormone if you're under 6 hours. at 7–9 hours with a cool, dark room, you're hitting the conditions where muscle actually builds. consistency matters more than one perfect night.

cards.label: nightly sleep target for optimal recovery and hypertrophy
daily growth hormone released during slow-wave sleep
testosterone reduction from sleep deprivation (<6 hr/night)
ideal room temperature for deep-sleep architecture
pre-sleep wind-down to improve slow-wave quality
